title: Keto Middle Eastern Tamarind Chicken Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy stir fry dish made with chicken, tamarind, and a blend of middle eastern spices, all keto-friendly.
instructions: Heat coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-6 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the onion and bell pepper to the skillet and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the tamarind paste, middle eastern spice blend, and stir-fry sauce.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to coat with the sauce.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
